conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately, overall?
I have been really tired. I used to be able to get up and go, but now I just feel like I am dragging myself through the day.
How long has it been since you've felt like you could get up and go?
Months, maybe a year? It started after my mum passed away. I think I just stopped living, you know?
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Yeah, it is. I sit there trying to watch TV, but I just can't follow the plot. I end up just staring at the screen, feeling like my brain has gone foggy.
How long does that foggy feeling usually last when you're trying to focus?
It just stays. It’s like I am stuck in this cloud, and I can’t find my way out.
How have you been sleeping lately?
Not at all. I just lie there, thinking about the past, and I never seem to get the rest I need.
How long has this been happening?
Months, I suppose. It started when my mum passed away, and it just never really went away.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
No, not really. I used to love gardening, but I haven't touched it in ages. I just can't seem to find the energy to do anything that used to bring me joy.
What's it like when you think about starting something like gardening now?
It sounds like too much work. I look at the garden and I just feel guilty that I haven't been able to keep it up.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
More of the same, I suppose. Just existing. I don't really see a way out of it.
What does "just existing" feel like for you right now?
It feels like I am just going through the motions. I am not really living.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
Yes, I find it really hard to decide what to eat for dinner, let alone anything bigger.
How long has it been a struggle to choose something like dinner?
Months, I think. Ever since my mum died, I have just felt so lost.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
No, I don't. I am always tired.
How long has this tiredness been affecting your daily routine?
It started after my mum passed away.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
No, I have lost interest in everything.
How long has it felt like nothing holds your interest?
Months. I used to be the one who kept things going, but now I just don't have the energy.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
I wish I could turn back the clock. I miss her so much.
Who is the 'her' you miss?
My mum.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
I am sorry.
What are you sorry for?
For not being the person I used to be.
How's your appetite been?
I don't eat much.
Has that been a recent change for you?
Yes, since my mum passed away.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
Yes. I just miss her so much.
